official_desc:

pkmn_shortDesc: User takes 1/4 its max HP to put in a substitute.
pkmn_desc: The user takes 1/4 of its maximum HP, rounded down, and puts it into a substitute to take its place in battle. The substitute is removed once enough damage is inflicted on it, if the user switches out or faints, or if any Pokemon uses Tidy Up. Baton Pass can be used to transfer the substitute to an ally, and the substitute will keep its remaining HP. Until the substitute is broken, it receives damage from all attacks made by other Pokemon and shields the user from status effects and stat stage changes caused by other Pokemon. Sound-based moves and Pokemon with the Infiltrator Ability ignore substitutes. The user still takes normal damage from weather and status effects while behind its substitute. If the substitute breaks during a multi-hit attack, the user will take damage from any remaining hits. If a substitute is created while the user is trapped by a binding move, the binding effect ends immediately. Fails if the user does not have enough HP remaining to create a substitute without fainting, or if it already has a substitute.

1 stage.
pkmn_shortDesc: 20% chance to lower the target's Sp. Def by 1.
pkmn_desc: Has a 20% chance to lower the target's Special Defense by 1 stage.

name: Future Sight
description: Gives the target’s spot the Future Attack status.
official_desc: Gives the target’s spot the Future Attack status.
pkmn_shortDesc: Hits two turns after being used.
pkmn_desc: Deals damage two turns after this move is used. At the end of that turn, the damage is calculated at that time and dealt to the Pokemon at the position the target had when the move was used. If the user is no longer active at the time, damage is calculated based on the user's natural Special Attack stat, types, and level, with no boosts from its held item or Ability. Fails if this move or Doom Desire is already in effect for the target's position.

name: Rock Smash
pkmn_shortDesc: 50% chance to lower the target's Defense by 1.
pkmn_desc: Has a 50% chance to lower the target's Defense by 1 stage.

name: Whirlpool
description:
Gives the target the Bound status. This move’s power is
doubled if the target has the Submerged status.
official_desc:
Gives the target the Bound status. This move’s power is
doubled if the target has the Submerged status.
pkmn_shortDesc: Traps and damages the target for 4-5 turns.
pkmn_desc: Prevents the target from switching for four or five turns (seven turns if the user is holding Grip Claw). Causes damage to the target equal to 1/8 of its maximum HP (1/6 if the user is holding Binding Band), rounded down, at the end of each turn during effect. The target can still switch out if it is holding Shed Shell or uses Baton Pass, Flip Turn, Parting Shot, Shed Tail, Teleport, U-turn, or Volt Switch. The effect ends if either the user or the target leaves the field, or if the target uses Mortal Spin, Rapid Spin, or Substitute successfully. This effect is not stackable or reset by using this or another binding move.

name: Beat Up
description:
The target is attacked as many times as the number of Pokémon
in the user’s party. Pokémon that have fainted or have a status
condition are not counted. This move’s power is calculated
based on the Attack stats of the party Pokémon.
official_desc:
The target is attacked as many times as the number of Pokémon
in the user’s party. Pokémon that have fainted or have a status
condition are not counted. This move’s power is calculated
based on the Attack stats of the party Pokémon.
pkmn_shortDesc: All healthy allies aid in damaging the target.
pkmn_desc: Hits one time for the user and one time for each unfainted Pokemon without a non-volatile status condition in the user's party. The power of each hit is equal to 5+(X/10), where X is each participating Pokemon's base Attack; each hit is considered to come from the user.

name: Fake Out
description:
Makes the target flinch. This move fails unless it is the first move
used by the user after it enters a battle.
official_desc:
Makes the target flinch. This move fails unless it is the first move
used by the user after it enters a battle.
pkmn_shortDesc: Hits first. First turn out only. 100% flinch chance.
pkmn_desc: Has a 100% chance to make the target flinch. Fails unless it is the user's first turn on the field.

name: Uproar
description: The user gains the Uproar status.
official_desc: The user gains the Uproar status.
pkmn_shortDesc: Lasts 3 turns. Active Pokemon cannot fall asleep.
pkmn_desc: The user spends three turns locked into this move. This move targets an opponent at random on each turn. On the first of the three turns, all sleeping active Pokemon wake up. During the three turns, no active Pokemon can fall asleep by any means, and Pokemon switched in during the effect do not wake up. If the user is prevented from moving or the attack is not successful against the target during one of the turns, the effect ends.

name: Stockpile
description:
Boosts the user’s Defense and Sp. Def stats by 1 stage. Raises
the user’s Stockpiling level by 1. Can be used up to 3 times.
official_desc:
Boosts the user’s Defense and Sp. Def stats by 1 stage. Raises
the user’s Stockpiling level by 1. Can be used up to 3 times.
pkmn_shortDesc: Raises user's Defense, Sp. Def by 1. Max 3 uses.
pkmn_desc: Raises the user's Defense and Special Defense by 1 stage. The user's Stockpile count increases by 1. Fails if the user's Stockpile count is 3. The user's Stockpile count is reset to 0 when it is no longer active.

name: Spit Up
description:
The higher the user’s Stockpiling level, the greater this move’s
power (ranging between 100 and 300). This move fails unless
the user has the Stockpiling status.
official_desc:
The higher the user’s Stockpiling level, the greater this move’s
power (ranging between 100 and 300). This move fails unless
the user has the Stockpiling status.
pkmn_shortDesc: More power with more uses of Stockpile.
pkmn_desc: Power is equal to 100 times the user's Stockpile count. Fails if the user's Stockpile count is 0. Whether or not this move is successful, the user's Defense and Special Defense decrease by as many stages as Stockpile had increased them, and the user's Stockpile count resets to 0.

name: Swallow
description:
The higher the user’s Stockpiling level, the more HP the
user restores. Level 1: 1/4 of the user’s max HP is restored.
Level 2: 1/2 of the user’s max HP is restored. Level 3: The
user’s HP is fully restored. This move fails unless the user
has the Stockpiling status.
official_desc:
The higher the user’s Stockpiling level, the more HP the
user restores. Level 1: 1/4 of the user’s max HP is restored.
Level 2: 1/2 of the user’s max HP is restored. Level 3: The
user’s HP is fully restored. This move fails unless the user
has the Stockpiling status.
pkmn_shortDesc: Heals the user based on uses of Stockpile.
pkmn_desc: The user restores its HP based on its Stockpile count. Restores 1/4 of its maximum HP if it's 1, 1/2 of its maximum HP if it's 2, both rounded half down, and all of its HP if it's 3. Fails if the user's Stockpile count is 0. The user's Defense and Special Defense decrease by as many stages as Stockpile had increased them, and the user's Stockpile count resets to 0.

name: Heat Wave
description: Has a 10% chance of burning targets.
official_desc: Has a 10% chance of burning targets.
pkmn_shortDesc: 10% chance to burn the foe(s).
pkmn_desc: Has a 10% chance to burn the target.

name: Hail
pkmn_shortDesc: For 5 turns, hail crashes down.
pkmn_desc: For 5 turns, the weather becomes Hail. At the end of each turn except the last, all active Pokemon lose 1/16 of their maximum HP, rounded down, unless they are an Ice type or have the Ice Body, Magic Guard, Overcoat, or Snow Cloak Abilities. Lasts for 8 turns if the user is holding Icy Rock. Fails if the current weather is Hail.

name: Torment
description: Gives the target the Unable to Repeat status.
official_desc: Gives the target the Unable to Repeat status.
pkmn_shortDesc: Target can't select the same move twice in a row.
pkmn_desc: Prevents the target from selecting the same move for use two turns in a row. This effect ends when the target is no longer active.

name: Flatter
description: Boosts the target’s Sp. Atk stat by 1 stage and confuses it.
official_desc: Boosts the target’s Sp. Atk stat by 1 stage and confuses it.
pkmn_shortDesc: Raises the target's Sp. Atk by 1 and confuses it.
pkmn_desc: Raises the target's Special Attack by 1 stage and confuses it.

name: Will-O-Wisp
description: Burns the target.
official_desc: Burns the target.
pkmn_shortDesc: Burns the target.
pkmn_desc: Burns the target.

name: Memento
description:
Lowers the target’s Attack and Sp. Atk stats by 2 stages.
The user faints upon using this move.
official_desc:
Lowers the target’s Attack and Sp. Atk stats by 2 stages.
The user faints upon using this move.
pkmn_shortDesc: Lowers target's Attack, Sp. Atk by 2. User faints.
pkmn_desc: Lowers the target's Attack and Special Attack by 2 stages. The user faints unless this move misses or there is no target. Fails entirely if this move hits a substitute, but does not fail if the target's stats cannot be changed.

name: Facade
description:
This move’s power is doubled if the user is poisoned, badly
poisoned, burned, or paralyzed. Although this move is a
physical move, the damage it deals is not halved when the
user is burned.
official_desc:
This move’s power is doubled if the user is poisoned, badly
poisoned, burned, or paralyzed. Although this move is a
physical move, the damage it deals is not halved when the
user is burned.
pkmn_shortDesc: Power doubles if user is burn/poison/paralyzed.
pkmn_desc: Power doubles if the user is burned, paralyzed, or poisoned. The physical damage halving effect from the user's burn is ignored.

name: Focus Punch
description:
This move fails if the user has already taken damage from a
move in the same turn.
official_desc:
This move fails if the user has already taken damage from a
move in the same turn.
pkmn_shortDesc: Fails if the user takes damage before it hits.
pkmn_desc: The user loses its focus and does nothing if it is hit by a damaging attack this turn before it can execute the move.

name: Smelling Salts
pkmn_shortDesc: Power doubles if target is paralyzed, and cures it.
pkmn_desc: Power doubles if the target is paralyzed. If the user has not fainted, the target is cured of paralysis.

name: Follow Me
description:
The user redirects opponents’ moves toward itself. This effect
works only on single-target moves.
official_desc:
The user redirects opponents’ moves toward itself. This effect
works only on single-target moves.
pkmn_shortDesc: The foes' moves target the user on the turn used.
pkmn_desc: Until the end of the turn, all single-target attacks from the opposing side are redirected to the user. Such attacks are redirected to the user before they can be reflected by Magic Coat or the Magic Bounce Ability, or drawn in by the Lightning Rod or Storm Drain Abilities. Fails if it is not a Double Battle or Battle Royal. This effect is ignored while the user is under the effect of Sky Drop.

name: Nature Power
pkmn_shortDesc: Attack depends on terrain (default Tri Attack).
pkmn_desc: This move calls another move for use based on the battle terrain. Tri Attack on the regular Wi-Fi terrain, Thunderbolt during Electric Terrain, Moonblast during Misty Terrain, Energy Ball during Grassy Terrain, and Psychic during Psychic Terrain.

name: Charge
description:
Boosts the user’s Sp. Def stat by 1 stage. The user gains the
Electric Boost status.
official_desc:
Boosts the user’s Sp. Def stat by 1 stage. The user gains the
Electric Boost status.
pkmn_shortDesc: +1 SpD, user's next Electric move 2x power.
pkmn_desc: Raises the user's Special Defense by 1 stage. The user's next Electric-type attack will have its power doubled; the effect ends when the user is no longer active, or after the user attempts to use any Electric-type move besides Charge, even if it is not successful.

name: Taunt
description: Gives the target the Taunted status.
official_desc: Gives the target the Taunted status.
pkmn_shortDesc: Target can't use status moves its next 3 turns.
pkmn_desc: Prevents the target from using non-damaging moves for its next three turns. Pokemon with the Oblivious Ability or protected by the Aroma Veil Ability are immune.

name: Helping Hand
description:
Boosts the power of an ally’s move by 50% during the turn this
move is used.
official_desc:
Boosts the power of an ally’s move by 50% during the turn this
move is used.
pkmn_shortDesc: One adjacent ally's move power is 1.5x this turn.
pkmn_desc: The power of the target's attack this turn is multiplied by 1.5 (this effect is stackable). Fails if there is no ally adjacent to the user or if the ally already moved this turn, but does not fail if the ally is using a two-turn move.

name: Trick
description: The user and the target swap their held items.
official_desc: The user and the target swap their held items.
pkmn_shortDesc: User switches its held item with the target's.
pkmn_desc: The user swaps its held item with the target's held item. Fails if either the user or the target is holding a Mail or Z-Crystal, if neither is holding an item, if the user is trying to give or take a Mega Stone to or from the species that can Mega Evolve with it, or if the user is trying to give or take a Blue Orb, a Red Orb, a Griseous Orb, a Plate, a Drive, or a Memory to or from a Kyogre, a Groudon, a Giratina, an Arceus, a Genesect, or a Silvally, respectively. The target is immune to this move if it has the Sticky Hold Ability.

name: Role Play
description: Changes the user’s Ability to be the same as the target’s.
official_desc: Changes the user’s Ability to be the same as the target’s.
pkmn_shortDesc: User replaces its Ability with the target's.
pkmn_desc: The user's Ability changes to match the target's Ability. Fails if the user's Ability is As One, Battle Bond, Comatose, Disguise, Gulp Missile, Ice Face, Multitype, Power Construct, RKS System, Schooling, Shields Down, Stance Change, Tera Shift, Zen Mode, Zero to Hero, or already matches the target, or if the target's Ability is As One, Battle Bond, Comatose, Commander, Disguise, Embody Aspect, Flower Gift, Forecast, Hunger Switch, Ice Face, Illusion, Imposter, Multitype, Neutralizing Gas, Poison Puppeteer, Power Construct, Power of Alchemy, Protosynthesis, Quark Drive, Receiver, RKS System, Schooling, Shields Down, Stance Change, Tera Shell, Tera Shift, Teraform Zero, Trace, Wonder Guard, Zen Mode, or Zero to Hero.

name: Wish

official_desc: Gives the user’s spot the Wish status.
pkmn_shortDesc: Next turn, 50% of the user's max HP is restored.
pkmn_desc: At the end of the next turn, the Pokemon at the user's position has 1/2 of the user's maximum HP restored to it, rounded down. Fails if this move is already in effect for the user's position.

name: Assist
pkmn_shortDesc: Uses a random move known by a team member.
pkmn_desc: A random move among those known by the user's party members is selected for use. Does not select Assist, Baneful Bunker, Beak Blast, Belch, Bestow, Blazing Torque, Bounce, Celebrate, Chatter, Circle Throw, Combat Torque, Copycat, Counter, Covet, Destiny Bond, Detect, Dig, Dive, Dragon Tail, Endure, Feint, Fly, Focus Punch, Follow Me, Helping Hand, Hold Hands, King's Shield, Magical Torque, Mat Block, Me First, Metronome, Mimic, Mirror Coat, Mirror Move, Nature Power, Noxious Torque, Phantom Force, Protect, Rage Powder, Roar, Shadow Force, Shell Trap, Sketch, Sky Drop, Sleep Talk, Snatch, Spiky Shield, Spotlight, Struggle, Switcheroo, Tera Starstorm, Thief, Transform, Trick, Whirlwind, or Wicked Torque.

name: Ingrain
description: The user gains the Ingrained status.
official_desc: The user gains the Ingrained status.
pkmn_shortDesc: Traps/grounds user; heals 1/16 max HP per turn.
pkmn_desc: The user has 1/16 of its maximum HP restored at the end of each turn, but it is prevented from switching out and other Pokemon cannot force the user to switch out. The user can still switch out if it uses Baton Pass, Flip Turn, Parting Shot, Teleport, U-turn, or Volt Switch. If the user leaves the field using Baton Pass, the replacement will remain trapped and still receive the healing effect. During the effect, the user can be hit normally by Ground-type attacks and be affected by Spikes, Toxic Spikes, and Sticky Web, even if the user is a Flying type or has the Levitate Ability.

name: Superpower
description: Lowers the user’s Attack and Defense stats by 1 stage.
official_desc: Lowers the user’s Attack and Defense stats by 1 stage.
pkmn_shortDesc: Lowers the user's Attack and Defense by 1.
pkmn_desc: Lowers the user's Attack and Defense by 1 stage.

name: Magic Coat
pkmn_shortDesc: Bounces back certain non-damaging moves.
pkmn_desc: Until the end of the turn, the user is unaffected by certain non-damaging moves directed at it and will instead use such moves against the original user. Moves reflected in this way are unable to be reflected again by this or the Magic Bounce Ability's effect. Spikes, Stealth Rock, Sticky Web, and Toxic Spikes can only be reflected once per side, by the leftmost Pokemon under this or the Magic Bounce Ability's effect. The Lightning Rod and Storm Drain Abilities redirect their respective moves before this move takes effect.

name: Recycle
description:
Regenerates the last held item that the user consumed. The user
then holds this item once more.
official_desc:
Regenerates the last held item that the user consumed. The user
then holds this item once more.
pkmn_shortDesc: Restores the item the user last used.
pkmn_desc: The user regains the item it last used. Fails if the user is holding an item, if the user has not held an item, if the item was a popped Air Balloon, if the item was picked up by a Pokemon with the Pickup Ability, or if the item was lost to Bug Bite, Corrosive Gas, Covet, Incinerate, Knock Off, Pluck, or Thief. Items thrown with Fling can be regained.

name: Revenge
pkmn_shortDesc: Power doubles if user is damaged by the target.
pkmn_desc: Power doubles if the user was hit by the target this turn.

name: Brick Break
description:
Removes the Light Screen, Reflect, and Aurora Veil statuses on
the target’s side.
official_desc:
Removes the Light Screen, Reflect, and Aurora Veil statuses on
the target’s side.
pkmn_shortDesc: Destroys screens, unless the target is immune.
pkmn_desc: If this attack does not miss, the effects of Reflect, Light Screen, and Aurora Veil end for the target's side of the field before damage is calculated.

name: Yawn
description: Makes the target drowsy. This move never misses.
official_desc: Makes the target drowsy. This move never misses.
pkmn_shortDesc: Puts the target to sleep after 1 turn.
pkmn_desc: Causes the target to fall asleep at the end of the next turn. Fails when used if the target cannot fall asleep or if it already has a non-volatile status condition. At the end of the next turn, if the target is still active, does not have a non-volatile status condition, and can fall asleep, it falls asleep. If the target becomes affected, this effect cannot be prevented by Safeguard or a substitute, or by falling asleep and waking up during the effect.

name: Knock Off
description:
This move’s power is boosted by 50% if the target is holding an
item. Causes the target to lose its held item.
official_desc:
This move’s power is boosted by 50% if the target is holding an
item. Causes the target to lose its held item.
pkmn_shortDesc: 1.5x damage if foe holds an item. Removes item.
pkmn_desc: If the target is holding an item that can be removed from it, ignoring the Sticky Hold Ability, this move's power is multiplied by 1.5. If the user has not fainted, the target loses its held item. This move cannot cause Pokemon with the Sticky Hold Ability to lose their held item or cause a Kyogre, a Groudon, a Giratina, an Arceus, a Genesect, a Silvally, a Zacian, or a Zamazenta to lose their Blue Orb, Red Orb, Griseous Orb, Plate, Drive, Memory, Rusted Sword, or Rusted Shield respectively. Items lost to this move cannot be regained with Recycle or the Harvest Ability.

name: Endeavor
description:
Deals damage to the target equal to its remaining HP minus the
user’s remaining HP. This move fails if the target’s HP is the same
as or lower than the user’s.
official_desc:
Deals damage to the target equal to its remaining HP minus the
user’s remaining HP. This move fails if the target’s HP is the same
as or lower than the user’s.
pkmn_shortDesc: Lowers the target's HP to the user's HP.
pkmn_desc: Deals damage to the target equal to (target's current HP - user's current HP). The target is unaffected if its current HP is less than or equal to the user's current HP.

name: Eruption
description:
The less HP the user has left, the lower this move’s power
(ranging between 1 and 150).
official_desc:
The less HP the user has left, the lower this move’s power
(ranging between 1 and 150).
pkmn_shortDesc: Less power as user's HP decreases. Hits foe(s).
pkmn_desc: Power is equal to (user's current HP * 150 / user's maximum HP), rounded down, but not less than 1.

name: Skill Swap
description: The user and the target swap their Abilities.
official_desc: The user and the target swap their Abilities.
pkmn_shortDesc: The user and the target trade Abilities.
pkmn_desc: The user swaps its Ability with the target's Ability. Fails if either the user or the target's Ability is As One, Battle Bond, Comatose, Commander, Disguise, Embody Aspect, Hunger Switch, Ice Face, Illusion, Multitype, Neutralizing Gas, Poison Puppeteer, Power Construct, Protosynthesis, Quark Drive, RKS System, Schooling, Shields Down, Stance Change, Tera Shell, Tera Shift, Teraform Zero, Wonder Guard, Zen Mode, or Zero to Hero.

name: Imprison

official_desc: The user gains the Sealing Off status.
pkmn_shortDesc: No foe can use any move known by the user.
pkmn_desc: The user prevents all opposing Pokemon from using any moves that the user also knows as long as the user remains active.

name: Refresh
pkmn_shortDesc: User cures its burn, poison, or paralysis.
pkmn_desc: The user cures its burn, poison, or paralysis. Fails if the user is not burned, poisoned, or paralyzed.

name: Grudge
pkmn_shortDesc: If the user faints, the attack used loses all its PP.
pkmn_desc: Until the user's next turn, if an opposing Pokemon's attack knocks the user out, that move loses all its remaining PP.

name: Snatch
pkmn_shortDesc: User steals certain support moves to use itself.
pkmn_desc: If another Pokemon uses certain non-damaging moves this turn, the user steals that move to use itself. If multiple Pokemon use one of those moves this turn, the applicable moves are all stolen by the first Pokemon in turn order that used this move this turn. This effect is ignored while the user is under the effect of Sky Drop.

name: Secret Power
pkmn_shortDesc: Effect varies with terrain. (30% paralysis chance)
pkmn_desc: Has a 30% chance to cause a secondary effect on the target based on the battle terrain. Causes paralysis on the regular Wi-Fi terrain, causes paralysis during Electric Terrain, lowers Special Attack by 1 stage during Misty Terrain, causes sleep during Grassy Terrain and lowers Speed by 1 stage during Psychic Terrain.

name: Dive
description:
The user gains the Submerged status on the turn this move is
used, then attacks on the following turn.
official_desc:
The user gains the Submerged status on the turn this move is
used, then attacks on the following turn.
pkmn_shortDesc: Dives underwater turn 1, strikes turn 2.
pkmn_desc: This attack charges on the first turn and executes on the second. On the first turn, the user avoids all attacks other than Surf and Whirlpool but takes double damage from them, and is also unaffected by weather. If the user is holding a Power Herb, the move completes in one turn.

name: Arm Thrust
pkmn_shortDesc: Hits 2-5 times in one turn.
pkmn_desc: Hits two to five times. Has a 35% chance to hit two or three times and a 15% chance to hit four or five times. If one of the hits breaks the target's substitute, it will take damage for the remaining hits. If the user has the Skill Link Ability, this move will always hit five times. If the user is holding Loaded Dice, this move will hit 4-5 times.

name: Camouflage
pkmn_shortDesc: Changes user's type by terrain (default Normal).
pkmn_desc: The user's type changes based on the battle terrain. Normal type on the regular Wi-Fi terrain, Electric type during Electric Terrain, Fairy type during Misty Terrain, Grass type during Grassy Terrain, and Psychic type during Psychic Terrain. Fails if the user's type cannot be changed or if the user is already purely that type.

name: Weather Ball

When a weather condition is present, this move’s power is
doubled and its type changes. Harsh sunlight: Fire type.
Rain: Water type. Snow: Ice type. Sandstorm: Rock type.
official_desc:
When a weather condition is present, this move’s power is
doubled and its type changes. Harsh sunlight: Fire type.
Rain: Water type. Snow: Ice type. Sandstorm: Rock type.
pkmn_shortDesc: Power doubles and type varies in each weather.
pkmn_desc: Power doubles if a weather condition other than Delta Stream is active, and this move's type changes to match. Ice type during Snow, Water type during Primordial Sea or Rain Dance, Rock type during Sandstorm, and Fire type during Desolate Land or Sunny Day. If the user is holding Utility Umbrella and uses Weather Ball during Primordial Sea, Rain Dance, Desolate Land, or Sunny Day, this move remains Normal type and does not double in power.

name: Sand Tomb
description: Gives the target the Bound status.
official_desc: Gives the target the Bound status.
pkmn_shortDesc: Traps and damages the target for 4-5 turns.
pkmn_desc: Prevents the target from switching for four or five turns (seven turns if the user is holding Grip Claw). Causes damage to the target equal to 1/8 of its maximum HP (1/6 if the user is holding Binding Band), rounded down, at the end of each turn during effect. The target can still switch out if it is holding Shed Shell or uses Baton Pass, Flip Turn, Parting Shot, Shed Tail, Teleport, U-turn, or Volt Switch. The effect ends if either the user or the target leaves the field, or if the target uses Mortal Spin, Rapid Spin, or Substitute successfully. This effect is not stackable or reset by using this or another binding move.

name: Sheer Cold
description:
Knocks out the target. This move does not affect Ice types. The
accuracy of this move is fixed at 30%. If used by Pokémon other
than Ice types, the accuracy of this move is 20%.
official_desc:
Knocks out the target. This move does not affect Ice types. The
accuracy of this move is fixed at 30%. If used by Pokémon other
than Ice types, the accuracy of this move is 20%.
pkmn_shortDesc: OHKOs non-Ice targets. Fails if user's lower level.
pkmn_desc: Deals damage to the target equal to the target's maximum HP. Ignores accuracy and evasiveness modifiers. This attack's accuracy is equal to (user's level - target's level + X)%, where X is 30 if the user is an Ice type and 20 otherwise, and fails if the target is at a higher level. Ice-type Pokemon and Pokemon with the Sturdy Ability are immune.

If one of the hits breaks the target's substitute, it will take damage for the remaining hits. If the user has the Skill Link Ability, this move will always hit five times. If the user is holding Loaded Dice, this move will hit 4-5 times.

held item.

If the user is not already holding an item, it steals the target’s
held item.

pkmn_desc: If this attack was successful and the user has not fainted, it steals the target's held item if the user is not holding one. The target's item is not stolen if it is a Mail or Z-Crystal, or if the target is a Kyogre holding a Blue Orb, a Groudon holding a Red Orb, a Giratina holding a Griseous Orb, an Arceus holding a Plate, a Genesect holding a Drive, a Silvally holding a Memory, or a Pokemon that can Mega Evolve holding the Mega Stone for its species. pkmn_shortDesc: Hits two turns after being used.
pkmn_desc: Deals damage two turns after this move is used. At the end of that turn, the damage is calculated at that time and dealt to the Pokemon at the position the target had when the move was used. If the user is no longer active at the time, damage is calculated based on the user's natural Special Attack stat, types, and level, with no boosts from its held item or Ability. Fails if this move or Future Sight is already in effect for the target's position.

name: Psycho Boost
pkmn_shortDesc: Lowers the user's Sp. Atk by 2.
pkmn_desc: Lowers the user's Special Attack by 2 stages.

name: Roost
description:
Restores 1/2 of the user’s max HP. If the user is a Flying type,
it will lose the Flying type for the turn.
official_desc:
Restores 1/2 of the user’s max HP. If the user is a Flying type,
it will lose the Flying type for the turn.
pkmn_shortDesc: Heals 50% HP. Flying-type removed 'til turn ends.
pkmn_desc: The user restores 1/2 of its maximum HP, rounded half up. If the user is not Terastallized, until the end of the turn Flying-type users lose their Flying type and pure Flying-type users become Normal type. Does nothing if the user's HP is full.

name: Gravity
description: Gives the entire field the Gravity status for 5 turns.
official_desc: Gives the entire field the Gravity status for 5 turns.
pkmn_shortDesc: 5 turns: no Ground immunities, 1.67x accuracy.
pkmn_desc: For 5 turns, the evasiveness of all active Pokemon is multiplied by 0.6. At the time of use, Bounce, Fly, Magnet Rise, Sky Drop, and Telekinesis end immediately for all active Pokemon. During the effect, Bounce, Fly, Flying Press, High Jump Kick, Jump Kick, Magnet Rise, Sky Drop, Splash, and Telekinesis are prevented from being used by all active Pokemon. Ground-type attacks, Spikes, Toxic Spikes, Sticky Web, and the Arena Trap Ability can affect Flying types or Pokemon with the Levitate Ability. Fails if this move is already in effect.

name: Miracle Eye
pkmn_shortDesc: Psychic hits Dark. Evasiveness ignored.
pkmn_desc: As long as the target remains active, its evasiveness stat stage is ignored during accuracy checks against it if it is greater than 0, and Psychic-type attacks can hit the target if it is a Dark type. Fails if the target is already affected, or affected by Foresight or Odor Sleuth.

name: Wake-Up Slap
pkmn_shortDesc: Power doubles if target is asleep, and wakes it.
pkmn_desc: Power doubles if the target is asleep. If the user has not fainted, the target wakes up.

name: Hammer Arm
description: Lowers the user’s Speed stat by 1 stage.
official_desc: Lowers the user’s Speed stat by 1 stage.
pkmn_shortDesc: Lowers the user's Speed by 1.
pkmn_desc: Lowers the user's Speed by 1 stage.

name: Gyro Ball
description:
The lower the user’s Speed stat compared to the target’s, the
greater this move’s power (ranging between 1 and 150).
official_desc:
The lower the user’s Speed stat compared to the target’s, the
greater this move’s power (ranging between 1 and 150).
pkmn_shortDesc: More power the slower the user than the target.
pkmn_desc: Power is equal to (25 * target's current Speed / user's current Speed) + 1, rounded down, but not more than 150. If the user's current Speed is 0, this move's power is 1.

name: Healing Wish
description:
The user faints. The Pokémon taking its place will have its HP
fully restored and its status conditions cured.
official_desc:
The user faints. The Pokémon taking its place will have its HP
fully restored and its status conditions cured.
pkmn_shortDesc: User faints. Next hurt Pokemon is fully healed.
pkmn_desc: The user faints, and if the Pokemon brought out to replace it does not have full HP or has a non-volatile status condition, its HP is fully restored along with having any non-volatile status condition cured. The replacement is sent out at the end of the turn, and the healing happens before hazards take effect. This effect continues until a Pokemon that meets either of these conditions switches in at the user's position or gets swapped into the position with Ally Switch. Fails if the user is the last unfainted Pokemon in its party.

name: Brine
pkmn_shortDesc: Power doubles if the target's HP is 50% or less.
pkmn_desc: Power doubles if the target has less than or equal to half of its maximum HP remaining.

name: Natural Gift
pkmn_shortDesc: Power and type depends on the user's Berry.
pkmn_desc: The type and power of this move depend on the user's held Berry, and the Berry is lost. Fails if the user is not holding a Berry, if the user has the Klutz Ability, or if Embargo or Magic Room is in effect for the user.

name: Feint
description:
This move can hit a target using a move such as Protect or
Detect and removes the effects of those moves.
official_desc:
This move can hit a target using a move such as Protect or
Detect and removes the effects of those moves.
pkmn_shortDesc: Nullifies Detect, Protect, and Quick/Wide Guard.
pkmn_desc: If this move is successful, it breaks through the target's Baneful Bunker, Detect, King's Shield, Protect, or Spiky Shield for this turn, allowing other Pokemon to attack the target normally. If the target's side is protected by Crafty Shield, Mat Block, Quick Guard, or Wide Guard, that protection is also broken for this turn and other Pokemon may attack the target's side normally.

name: Pluck
description:
If the target is holding a Berry, the user eats that Berry and
gains its effect.
official_desc:
If the target is holding a Berry, the user eats that Berry and
gains its effect.
pkmn_shortDesc: User steals and eats the target's Berry.
pkmn_desc: If this move is successful and the user has not fainted, it steals the target's held Berry if it is holding one and eats it immediately, gaining its effects even if the user's item is being ignored. Items lost to this move cannot be regained with Recycle or the Harvest Ability.

name: Tailwind
description: Gives the user’s side the Tailwind status for 4 turns.
official_desc: Gives the user’s side the Tailwind status for 4 turns.
pkmn_shortDesc: For 4 turns, allies' Speed is doubled.
pkmn_desc: For 4 turns, the user and its party members have their Speed doubled. Fails if this move is already in effect for the user's side.

name: Acupressure
description:
Boosts the Attack, Defense, Sp. Atk, Sp. Def, Speed, accuracy,
or evasiveness of the user or an ally by 2 stages.
official_desc:
Boosts the Attack, Defense, Sp. Atk, Sp. Def, Speed, accuracy,
or evasiveness of the user or an ally by 2 stages.
pkmn_shortDesc: Raises a random stat of the user or an ally by 2.
pkmn_desc: Raises a random stat by 2 stages as long as the stat is not already at stage 6. The user can choose to use this move on itself or an adjacent ally. Fails if no stat stage can be raised or if used on an ally with a substitute.

name: Metal Burst
description:
The user retaliates to deal 150% of the damage it took from an
opponent’s move during the turn this move is used.
official_desc:
The user retaliates to deal 150% of the damage it took from an
opponent’s move during the turn this move is used.
pkmn_shortDesc: If hit by an attack, returns 1.5x damage.
pkmn_desc: Deals damage to the last opposing Pokemon to hit the user with a physical or special attack this turn equal to 1.5 times the HP lost by the user from that attack, rounded down. If the user did not lose HP from that attack, this move deals 1 HP of damage instead. If that opposing Pokemon's position is no longer in use and there is another opposing Pokemon on the field, the damage is done to it instead. Only the last hit of a multi-hit attack is counted. Fails if the user was not hit by an opposing Pokemon's physical or special attack this turn.

name: U-turn
description:
After attacking, the user switches out of battle to be replaced
by another party Pokémon.
official_desc:
After attacking, the user switches out of battle to be replaced
by another party Pokémon.
pkmn_shortDesc: User switches out after damaging the target.
pkmn_desc: If this move is successful and the user has not fainted, the user switches out even if it is trapped and is replaced immediately by a selected party member. The user does not switch out if there are no unfainted party members, or if the target switched out using an Eject Button or through the effect of the Emergency Exit or Wimp Out Abilities.

name: Close Combat
description: Lowers the user’s Defense and Sp. Def stats by 1 stage.
official_desc: Lowers the user’s Defense and Sp. Def stats by 1 stage.
pkmn_shortDesc: Lowers the user's Defense and Sp. Def by 1.
pkmn_desc: Lowers the user's Defense and Special Defense by 1 stage.

name: Payback
description: This move’s power is doubled if the user attacks after the target.
official_desc: This move’s power is doubled if the user attacks after the target.
pkmn_shortDesc: Power doubles if the user moves after the target.
pkmn_desc: Power doubles if the user moves after the target this turn, including actions taken through Instruct or the Dancer Ability. Switching in does not count as an action.

name: Assurance
description:
This move’s power is doubled if the target has already taken
damage during the turn this move is used.
official_desc:
This move’s power is doubled if the target has already taken
damage during the turn this move is used.
pkmn_shortDesc: Power doubles if target was damaged this turn.
pkmn_desc: Power doubles if the target has already taken damage this turn, other than direct damage from Belly Drum, confusion, Curse, or Pain Split.

name: Embargo
pkmn_shortDesc: For 5 turns, the target's item has no effect.
pkmn_desc: For 5 turns, the target's held item has no effect. An item's effect of causing forme changes is unaffected, but any other effects from such items are negated. During the effect, Fling and Natural Gift are prevented from being used by the target. Items thrown at the target with Fling will still activate for it. If the target uses Baton Pass, the replacement will remain unable to use items.

name: Fling
description:
This move’s power and effects depend on the user’s held item.
The held item is lost after this move is used.
official_desc:
This move’s power and effects depend on the user’s held item.
The held item is lost after this move is used.
pkmn_shortDesc: Flings the user's item at the target. Power varies.
pkmn_desc: The power of this move is based on the user's held item. The held item is lost and it activates for the target if applicable. If there is no target or the target avoids this move by protecting itself, the user's held item is still lost. The user can regain a thrown item with Recycle or the Harvest Ability. Fails if the user has no held item, if the held item cannot be thrown, if the user is under the effect of Embargo or Magic Room, or if the user has the Klutz Ability.

name: Psycho Shift
pkmn_shortDesc: Transfers the user's status ailment to the target.
pkmn_desc: The user's non-volatile status condition is transferred to the target, and the user is then cured. Fails if the user has no non-volatile status condition or if the target already has one.

name: Trump Card
pkmn_shortDesc: More power the fewer PP this move has left.
pkmn_desc: The power of this move is based on the amount of PP remaining after normal PP reduction and the Pressure Ability resolve. 200 power for 0 PP, 80 power for 1 PP, 60 power for 2 PP, 50 power for 3 PP, and 40 power for 4 or more PP.

name: Heal Block
pkmn_shortDesc: For 5 turns, the foe(s) is prevented from healing.
pkmn_desc: For 5 turns, the target is prevented from restoring any HP as long as it remains active. During the effect, healing and draining moves are unusable, and Abilities and items that grant healing will not heal the user. If an affected Pokemon uses Baton Pass, the replacement will remain unable to restore its HP. Pain Split and the Regenerator Ability are unaffected.

name: Wring Out
pkmn_shortDesc: More power the more HP the target has left.
pkmn_desc: Power is equal to 120 * (target's current HP / target's maximum HP), rounded half down, but not less than 1.

name: Power Trick
description: The user gains the Atk/Def Swapped status.
official_desc: The user gains the Atk/Def Swapped status.
pkmn_shortDesc: Switches user's Attack and Defense stats.
pkmn_desc: The user swaps its Attack and Defense stats, and stat stage changes remain on their respective stats. This move can be used again to swap the stats back. If the user uses Baton Pass, the replacement will have its Attack and Defense stats swapped if the effect is active. If the user has its stats recalculated by changing forme while its stats are swapped, this effect is ignored but is still active for the purposes of Baton Pass.

name: Gastro Acid
description: Gives the target the No Ability status.
official_desc: Gives the target the No Ability status.
pkmn_shortDesc: Nullifies the target's Ability.
pkmn_desc: Causes the target's Ability to be rendered ineffective as long as it remains active. If the target uses Baton Pass, the replacement will remain under this effect. If the target's Ability is As One, Battle Bond, Comatose, Disguise, Gulp Missile, Ice Face, Multitype, Power Construct, RKS System, Schooling, Shields Down, Stance Change, Tera Shift, Zen Mode, or Zero to Hero, this move fails, and receiving the effect through Baton Pass ends the effect immediately.

name: Lucky Chant
pkmn_shortDesc: For 5 turns, shields user's party from critical hits.
pkmn_desc: For 5 turns, the user and its party members cannot be struck by a critical hit. Fails if the effect is already active on the user's side.

name: Me First
pkmn_shortDesc: Copies a foe at 1.5x power. User must be faster.
pkmn_desc: The user uses the move the target chose for use this turn against it, if possible, with its power multiplied by 1.5. The move must be a damaging move other than Beak Blast, Belch, Blazing Torque, Combat Torque, Comeuppance, Counter, Covet, Focus Punch, Magical Torque, Me First, Metal Burst, Mirror Coat, Noxious Torque, Shell Trap, Struggle, Thief, or Wicked Torque. pkmn_shortDesc: 20% psn. Physical+contact if it would be stronger.
pkmn_desc: Has a 20% chance to poison the target. This move becomes a physical attack that makes contact if the value of ((((2 * the user's level / 5 + 2) * 90 * X) / Y) / 50), where X is the user's Attack stat and Y is the target's Defense stat, is greater than the same value where X is the user's Special Attack stat and Y is the target's Special Defense stat. No stat modifiers other than stat stage changes are considered for this purpose. If the two values are equal, this move chooses a damage category at random.
